Route110_TrickHousePuzzle3_Text_WroteSec.label: Route110_TrickHousePuzzle3_Text_WroteSecretCodeLockOpened
Route110_TrickHousePuzzle3_Text_WroteSec.raw_text: {PLAYER}在门上写下\n密码。\p“戏法大王令人仰慕”\n…… …… …… ……\p锁“咔嗒”一声开了！$
Route110_TrickHousePuzzle3_Text_WroteSec.display_text:
{PLAYER}在门上写下
密码。

“戏法大王令人仰慕”
…… …… …… ……

锁“咔嗒”一声开了！

Route110_TrickHousePuzzle3_Text_JustinIn.label: Route110_TrickHousePuzzle3_Text_JustinIntro
Route110_TrickHousePuzzle3_Text_JustinIn.raw_text: 我总是会绕回相同的地方！$
Route110_TrickHousePuzzle3_Text_JustinIn.display_text: 我总是会绕回相同的地方！

Route110_TrickHousePuzzle3_Text_JustinDe.label: Route110_TrickHousePuzzle3_Text_JustinDefeat
Route110_TrickHousePuzzle3_Text_JustinDe.raw_text: 我已经麻烦缠身了，现在还有你\n打败了我。这不公平！$
Route110_TrickHousePuzzle3_Text_JustinDe.display_text:
我已经麻烦缠身了，现在还有你
打败了我。这不公平！

Route110_TrickHousePuzzle3_Text_JustinPo.label: Route110_TrickHousePuzzle3_Text_JustinPostBattle
Route110_TrickHousePuzzle3_Text_JustinPo.raw_text: 这儿到处都是门！\n太狭窄、太黑了！救命！$
Route110_TrickHousePuzzle3_Text_JustinPo.display_text:
这儿到处都是门！
太狭窄、太黑了！救命！

Route110_TrickHousePuzzle3_Text_MarthaIn.label: Route110_TrickHousePuzzle3_Text_MarthaIntro
Route110_TrickHousePuzzle3_Text_MarthaIn.raw_text: 我不知道这儿发生了什么，\n我开始感到伤心了……$
Route110_TrickHousePuzzle3_Text_MarthaIn.display_text:
我不知道这儿发生了什么，
我开始感到伤心了……

encoding.hex: 09 D9 B0 B0 09 D9 10 59 0C D7 0E CA 3C FF

Route110_TrickHousePuzzle3_Text_MarthaPo.label: Route110_TrickHousePuzzle3_Text_MarthaPostBattle
Route110_TrickHousePuzzle3_Text_MarthaPo.raw_text: 我知道我很弱！\n而且我还没有方向感！$
Route110_TrickHousePuzzle3_Text_MarthaPo.display_text:
我知道我很弱！
而且我还没有方向感！

Route110_TrickHousePuzzle3_Text_AlanIntr.label: Route110_TrickHousePuzzle3_Text_AlanIntro
Route110_TrickHousePuzzle3_Text_AlanIntr.raw_text: 我不明白，大家来这个\n稀奇古怪的房子究竟是为了什么？$
Route110_TrickHousePuzzle3_Text_AlanIntr.display_text:
我不明白，大家来这个
稀奇古怪的房子究竟是为了什么？

Route110_TrickHousePuzzle3_Text_AlanDefe.label: Route110_TrickHousePuzzle3_Text_AlanDefeat
Route110_TrickHousePuzzle3_Text_AlanDefe.display_text:
我不明白，
我怎么会输？

Route110_TrickHousePuzzle3_Text_AlanPost.label: Route110_TrickHousePuzzle3_Text_AlanPostBattle
Route110_TrickHousePuzzle3_Text_AlanPost.raw_text: 我不明白，\n这间房子里究竟有多少陷阱？\p也许你能回答这个问题吧。$
Route110_TrickHousePuzzle3_Text_AlanPost.display_text:
我不明白，
这间房子里究竟有多少陷阱？

也许你能回答这个问题吧。
